title: Starfleet Academy is Embarrassingly BAD - The Acolyte of Star Trek
description:
Starfleet Academy episode 4 is a crime against Star Trek. From getting famous Star Trek: TNG quotes wrong to Polyamorous Klingons. The bottom seems to be limitless. This show is the reason Paramount should not be allowed to buy Warner Brothers. 
Edited by @QTRBlackGarrett
